card.name: The Vigilante
card.text: Folk hero {4}{R}{R} — 6/5 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) Menace

card.name: Augury
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Draw two cards. If you're united, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Bloomburrow United
card.text: Create a 2/2 green creature token with a creature type of your choice. Flashback {4}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Blade of Grass
card.text: Create a Weapon token attached to target creature. That creature gains hexproof until end of turn. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: On the Offense
card.text: On the Offense deals 3 damage to target creature. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Rallying Rats
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) This creature has lifelink and menace, as long as you're united.

card.name: Calamitous Prescence
card.text: Enchant creature you control. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and can't be blocked except by legendary creatures.

card.name: Sword in the Stone
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.) {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: The Savior
card.text: Folk hero {4}{W} — 4/4 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Mouse creature token.

card.name: Veteran Lieutenant
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.) Equip abilities you activate cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Archelos, Slow and Steady
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Permanents you control enter untapped. As long as you're united, permanents your opponents control enter tapped.

card.name: Kwain, Bounding Bunny
card.text: Folk hero {3}{W}{U} — 3/3 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) {T}: You and target player may each draw X cards, where X is this creature's power.

card.name: Bello, Trinketmaster
card.text: Whenever you create a creature token, create your choice of a Clue, Food, Junk, Weapon, or Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Weapon tokens are Equipment artifacts with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Nightwhorl Assassin
card.text: Menace When this creature dies, create a tapped 2/2 colorless Rat token.

card.name: Seedbed Intimidation
card.text: Each opponent discards a card. You create a 1/1 black creature token with a creature type of your choice. {2}{B}, Discard this card: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Slay
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: The Lonely Traveler
card.text: Folk hero {5} — 4/3 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Ancestry Elder
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) {5}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you're united. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Protector of the Brambles
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) This creature gets +2/+2 and has trample as long as you're united.

card.name: Nefarious Needler
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Ral's Lightning
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Ral's Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If you're united, it deals 3 damage instead.

card.name: Otter Wizard
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Talespinning
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If it was legendary, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Pawpatch Sailor
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Whenever this creature becomes tapped, draw a card, then discard a card unless you're united.

card.name: Keen-Eyed Scout
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Of Fashioned Wings
card.text: Folk hero {3}{W}{W} — 4/4 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) Flying

card.name: A Steed Rider
card.text: Folk hero {3}{G}{G} — 5/5 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) Trample

card.name: A Humble Heron
card.text: Folk hero {5}{U} — 5/4 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) {2}{U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: A Mysterious Cloak
card.text: Folk hero {4}{B} — 5/4 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) Deathtouch

card.name: Finch Rider
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white creature token with a creature type of your choice.

card.name: Fateful Encounter
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token and a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.) Attach a Weapon you control to a creature you control.

card.name: Overworked
card.text: Enchant creature Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {W}, Sacrifice this Aura: Exile enchanted creature. Activate only if you're united.

card.name: Outer Scout
card.text: Flying Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Whenever this creature attacks, if you're united, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain menace until end of turn.

card.name: Treetop Recycler
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token. {1}{B}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Frogkin Jester
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) {T}: Add one mana of any color. If you're united, add two mana of any one color instead. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

card.name: Playful Stormchaser
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard graveyard. You may cast it this turn and mana of any type may can be spent to cast that spell. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: The Foretold Warriors
card.text: Folk hero {5}{B} — 5/6 (If you cast this for its folk hero cost, it's legendary and has different power and toughness.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, they lose life equal to its power unless they discard a card or sacrifice a nonland permanent.

card.name: Pick Up The Branch
card.text: Create a Weapon token attached to target creature you control. Then it deals damage equal to its power to any target. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}.)

card.name: Golden Griffin
card.text: Flying Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you're united.

card.name: Beza, Season of Spring
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Whenever you create one or more tokens, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token. Then if you're united, you create a Treasure token, draw a card and gain 4 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: The Rat King
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token with "This token can't block." Exhaust — {1}{B}{B}: Create a Swarm of Rats token. (It's a {1}{B} */1 Rat creature with "This creature's power is equal to the number of Rats you control.")

card.name: Ire, of the Burning Bog
card.text: Whenever Ire enters or deals combat damage to a player, put a blaze counter on up to one target land without a blaze counter on it. For as long as that land has a blaze counter on it, it has "At the beginning of your upkeep, this land deals 1 damage to you." Whenever you tap a land with a blaze counter on it for mana, add {R}.

card.name: United Village
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell. {6}, {T}: Create a 1/1 colorless creature token with the creature type of your choice.

card.name: Squirrel Squad
card.text: Unity (If there are six or more creature types among non-Human creatures you control, you become united for the rest of the game.) Create two 1/1 white Squirrel creature tokens. If you're united, create three of those tokens instead.

card.name: Lightning Stag
card.text: Trample Creature spells you control can't be countered. When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.
